race.comment: MAC AEDO (3) faced the starter for the first time and finished seventh last start at Gatton over 860m, beaten 4.5 lengths. Likely improver and can get off the mark this time. MONEY ON MY MIND (4) resumes from a spell of five-and-a-half months. Could only manage to finish sixth at the latest run over 1050m at Gold Coast Poly. Opened last prep with a minor placing at Ballina over 1015m. Leading player on best figures - bold showing expected. DORMELLETTO (1) gelding by Pride Of Dubai from Lips 'N' Lashes on debut. Ran second at recent trial. In the mix. BELTONE (5) was in a rearwards position on the turn last time out before finishing 5.5 lengths back in seventh over 1050m at Toowoomba. No surprise if she figured in the finish.
